title: 阳光与希望
subtitle: Talking About Optimism, Attitude, and Inspiration
assistant_message: Today we learn: discussing optimism and hope, using 将 (jiāng) for future actions, and expressing positive attitudes.

grammar.point_id: Menggunakan 将 (jiāng) untuk Aksi Masa Depan
grammar.explanation: 将 is a formal way to express future actions, similar to 会.
grammar.explanation_id: 将 adalah cara formal untuk menyatakan aksi masa depan, mirip dengan 会.

examples.chinese: 我们将迎来更美好的未来。
examples.translation: We will welcome a brighter future.
examples.translation_id: Kami akan menyambut masa depan yang lebih cerah.

grammar.explanation: 会 can express possibility or prediction about the future.
grammar.explanation_id: 会 dapat menyatakan kemungkinan atau prediksi tentang masa depan.

examples.chinese: 只要你努力，一定会成功的。
examples.translation: As long as you work hard, you will definitely succeed.
examples.translation_id: Asalkan kamu bekerja keras, pasti akan berhasil.

examples.translation: The weather will be good tomorrow.

dialogue.speaker: male
dialogue.name: Zhang Wei
dialogue.chinese: 最近遇到很多困难，我感到很沮丧。
dialogue.pinyin: Zuìjìn yùdào hěnduō kùnnan, wǒ gǎndào hěn jǔsàng.
dialogue.translation: I've encountered many difficulties lately, I feel very frustrated.
dialogue.translation_id: Akhir-akhir ini mengalami banyak kesulitan, saya merasa sangat frustrasi.

dialogue.speaker: female
dialogue.name: Li Mei
dialogue.chinese: 别灰心，阳光总在风雨后。只要坚持，就会有希望。
dialogue.pinyin: Bié huīxīn, yángguāng zǒng zài fēngyǔ hòu. Zhǐyào jiānchí, jiù huì yǒu xīwàng.
dialogue.translation: Don't lose heart, sunshine always comes after the storm. As long as you persist, there will be hope.
dialogue.translation_id: Jangan putus asa, sinar matahari selalu datang setelah badai. Asalkan kamu bertahan, akan ada harapan.

dialogue.speaker: male
dialogue.name: Zhang Wei
dialogue.chinese: 你说得对，我应该保持积极乐观的心态。
dialogue.pinyin: Nǐ shuō de duì, wǒ yīnggāi bǎochí jījí lèguān de xīntài.
dialogue.translation: You're right, I should maintain a positive and optimistic mindset.
dialogue.translation_id: Kamu benar, saya harus menjaga pola pikir positif dan optimis.

dialogue.speaker: female
dialogue.name: Li Mei
dialogue.pinyin: Xiāngxìn wèilái huì gèng hǎo. Jiāyóu!
dialogue.translation: Believe that the future will be better. Keep going!
dialogue.translation_id: Percayalah masa depan akan lebih baik. Semangat!

exercises.question: How do you say 'overcome difficulties' in Chinese?
exercises.question_id: Bagaimana mengatakan 'mengatasi kesulitan' dalam bahasa Mandarin?

exercises.question: How to say 'believe in the future' in Chinese?
exercises.question_id: Bagaimana mengatakan 'percaya pada masa depan' dalam bahasa Mandarin?
